rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Harrassowitz Verlag E Museo Britannico Imprimerie nationale In Bybliotheca Vaticana Tasfā mattāmiyā bet baTasfā māttamiyā bet tāttama Kegan Paul, Trench, Trübner & Co., Ltd. Tasfā mattāmiyā bet 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama Harrassowitz Verlag 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama In Bybliotheca Vaticana 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama In Bybliotheca Vaticana 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama Harrassowitz Verlag 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama Harrassowitz Verlag 'Aksum Māttamiyā Bet Tāttama, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg
rdf:Description.dc:title: No item: LIT1295Dersan
ድርሳነ፡ ሚካኤል፡
Dǝrsāna Mikāʾel
Homily in honour of the Archangel Michael
ድርሳን፡ ዘሚካኤል፡ ሊቀ፡ መላእክት፡
Dǝrsān za-Mikāʾel liqa malāʾǝkt
